title: Bulgarian Beef Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful traditional Bulgarian dish made with beef, rice, and spices.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the pilaf spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add the uncooked rice and stir to coat with the oil and mix with the beef and spices.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in the chopped dill and sour cream.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
